# Blaine Heffron

> Charleston-based AI automation consultant building workflow automation, internal tools, custom operations dashboards, and technical software for teams stuck in manual work.

## Key Pages

- [Home](https://blaineheffron.com/): AI automation consulting, workflow automation, custom ops dashboards, selected work, and contact.
- [Research](https://blaineheffron.com/research.html): Research background, physics publications, machine learning, and scientific computing.
- [Profile Card](https://blaineheffron.com/card/): Compact profile and contact page.

## Services

- Workflow bottleneck audits.
- Measurable automation pilots.
- Custom operations dashboards.
- Internal tools and workflow integrations.
- Technical AI systems, ML pipelines, and research software.
